query:
-- 添加orders表的customStatus字段
ALTER TABLE orders ADD COLUMN customStatus varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '自定义订单状态（从属性管理读取）';

-- 创建inspections表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS inspections (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  erpCompanyId int,
  orderId int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  inspectionMethods json COMMENT '验货方式（多选，JSON数组）',
  inspectionDate timestamp NULL COMMENT '验货日期',
  createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT inspections_id PRIMARY KEY(id),
  CONSTRAINT inspections_order_fk FOREIGN KEY (orderId) REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX inspections_erp_company_idx (erpCompanyId),
  INDEX inspections_order_idx (orderId)
);

-- 创建inspection_files表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS inspection_files (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  erpCompanyId int,
  inspectionId int NOT NULL,
  fileName varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  fileUrl text NOT NULL,
  fileKey text NOT NULL,
  fileSize int,
  mimeType varchar(100),
  sortOrder int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  uploadedBy int,
  uploadedAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT inspection_files_id PRIMARY KEY(id),
  CONSTRAINT inspection_files_inspection_fk FOREIGN KEY (inspectionId) REFERENCES inspections(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT inspection_files_uploaded_by_fk FOREIGN KEY (uploadedBy) REFERENCES users(id),
  INDEX inspection_files_erp_company_idx (erpCompanyId),
  INDEX inspection_files_inspection_idx (inspectionId)
);

-- 创建inspections表

  id int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,

  fileUrl text NOT NULL,
  fileKey text NOT NULL,

  CONSTRAINT inspection_files_id PRIMARY KEY(id),

  CONSTRAINT inspection_files_uploaded_by_fk FOREIGN KEY (uploadedBy) REFERENCES users(id),
  INDEX inspection_files_erp_company_idx (erpCompanyId),
  INDEX inspection_files_inspection_idx (inspectionId)
);
